projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: Examples of practical and robust systems solving real-world problems.
projects.p1_desc: A full-fledged Backend API for an e-commerce platform. Features include product management, cart, payment integration (Stripe/Click), and user authentication (JWT).
projects.p2_desc: An AI-powered Telegram bot to automate customer service. It receives user queries, saves them to a database, and provides an admin panel for management.
projects.p3_desc: A microservice that aggregates and analyzes cryptocurrency prices from various exchanges in real time, serving data to the frontend via WebSockets.
